excerpt: At Renterra, we recently launched a major upgrade to our fuel management capabilities to help rental companies accurately capture fuel usage, automate billing, and ensure every gallon consumed is billed correctly.
Track damage costs, fuel and Cross-Hire rates to ensure they’re attributed to the correct plant or contract. Enabling you to easily see your profit margin.

When an invoice shows starting fuel level, ending fuel level, quantity consumed, and price per gallon, customers are far less likely to dispute the charge. Accurate fuel tracking protects margins while improving trust and transparency.
